Package recoder.io

Class DefaultProjectFileIO

java.lang.Object
recoder.io.ProjectFileIO
recoder.io.DefaultProjectFileIO
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyNames
public class DefaultProjectFileIO extends ProjectFileIO implements PropertyNames
Imports and exports simple properties files.
Since:
0.63

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface recoder.io.PropertyNames

    ADD_NEWLINE_AT_END_OF_FILE, ALIGN_LABELS, CLASS_SEARCH_MODE, ERROR_THRESHOLD, GLUE_CONTROL_EXPRESSIONS, GLUE_DECLARATION_APPENDICES, GLUE_EXPRESSION_PARENTHESES, GLUE_INFIX_OPERATORS, GLUE_INITIALIZER_PARENTHESES, GLUE_LABELS, GLUE_MEMBERS, GLUE_PARAMETER_LISTS, GLUE_PARAMETER_PARENTHESES, GLUE_PARAMETERS, GLUE_SEQUENTIAL_BRANCHES, GLUE_STATEMENT_BLOCKS, GLUE_UNARY_OPERATORS, INDENT_CASE_BRANCHES, INDENTATION_AMOUNT, INPUT_PATH, JAVA_5, JDK1_4, OUTPUT_PATH, OVERWRITE_INDENTATION, OVERWRITE_PARSE_POSITIONS, TABSIZE

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DefaultProjectFileIO(ServiceConfiguration system, File projectFile)
    Sets up a new project file IO facility that reads from and/or writes to the specified (.properties) file.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    File
    getProjectFile()
    Returns the project file assigned.
    String[]
    load()
    Loads properties from the project file and returns the file names of the compilation units stored in the project file.
    void
    save()
    Saves the project properties to the assigned project file and adds all known compilation units.

  • Constructor Details

    • DefaultProjectFileIO

      public DefaultProjectFileIO(ServiceConfiguration system, File projectFile)
      Sets up a new project file IO facility that reads from and/or writes to the specified (.properties) file.
      Parameters:
      system - the service configuration to initialize.
      projectFile - the project file to load and/or save.

  • Method Details

    • getProjectFile

      public File getProjectFile()
      Returns the project file assigned.
      Returns:
      the current project file.

    • load

      public String[] load() throws IOException
      Description copied from class: ProjectFileIO
      Loads properties from the project file and returns the file names of the compilation units stored in the project file. It is left to subclasses to locate the project file.
      Specified by:
      load in class ProjectFileIO
      Returns:
      the filenames of the known compilation units.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • save

      public void save() throws IOException
      Saves the project properties to the assigned project file and adds all known compilation units.
      Specified by:
      save in class ProjectFileIO
      Throws:
      IOException
